title: orchis ustulata subsp. aestivalis
intro: Orchis ustulata subsp. aestivalis, also known as the summer-spurred orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its distinctive spur and vibrant coloration. The summer-spurred orchid is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the summer-spurred orchid can be made by infusing the flowers in water, creating a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
